svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 14px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 17px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 35px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #888888;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#888888, #787878); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Foundation deploys first. The other four take Foundation as a constructor arg and call addDependency(foundation), so cdk deploy --all sequences correctly.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 230, 204), rgb(54, 33, 10)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 538px; height: 1px; padding-top: 100px; margin-left: 261px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
FoundationStack (deploys first)
VPC - KMS CMK - single DynamoDB table - append-only audit table - S3 data lake - SNS - Cognito user pool

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 240px; height: 1px; padding-top: 293px; margin-left: 10px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
IngestionStack
- EventBridge schedule
- Ingestion state machine
(Distributed Map)
- Fetch/store Lambda
- DLQ

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 240px; height: 1px; padding-top: 293px; margin-left: 280px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
InsightStack
- Anomaly Lambda
- Correlation Lambda
- Bedrock insight Lambda
- Insight store
- Cost circuit breaker

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 240px; height: 1px; padding-top: 293px; margin-left: 550px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
ApiStack
- REST API GW (watchlist,
ingest, query, account/PII)
- Cognito group authorizers
- WAF

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 230, 204), rgb(54, 33, 10)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 240px; height: 1px; padding-top: 293px; margin-left: 820px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
SecurityStack
- Cognito groups + MFA
+ password policy
- Consent Lambda triggers
(PreAuth / PostConfirmation /
PreTokenGeneration)
- Erasure cascade (in DSR Lambda)
- Account/PII endpoints
- Audit-table writers
